所有程序包|所有类和接口

A

acceptInvitation(String, InvitationRepository.ActionCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.InvitationRepository
Marks an invitation as accepted.
addComment(Comment) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter
Adds a single comment to the end of the list and animates the insertion.
addComment(Comment, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentRepository
Adds a new comment to the Firestore database.
addCoOrganizer(String, String, CoOrganizerRepository.addCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Add the user id to a event to mark it as co-organizer
addInvitedUserToEvent(String, String, PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SimpleCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.PrivateEventInvitationRepository
Adds the specified user ID to the invited users list of the given event document in Firestore.
addReportedByUser(String) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Comment
Adds a user to the list of users who have reported this comment.
AdminBrowseEvents - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment for administrators to browse all events in the system.
AdminBrowseEvents() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminBrowseEvents
Default constructor required for fragment instantiation.
AdminBrowseImages - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment for administrators to browse all event posters stored in the cache.
AdminBrowseImages() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminBrowseImages
Default constructor required for fragment instantiation.
AdminBrowseProfiles - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment where admin can browse all user profiles in the system.
AdminBrowseProfiles() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminBrowseProfiles
Empty public constructor required for fragment instantiation.
AdminCommentAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of comments to admin users.
AdminCommentAdapter(AdminCommentAdapter.OnCommentClickListener) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminCommentAdapter
Constructs a new AdminCommentAdapter with the specified click listener.
AdminCommentAdapter.OnCommentClickListener - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for comment click events.
AdminEventAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events to admin users.
AdminEventAdapter(ArrayList<EventDetail>, ArrayList<String>) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventAdapter
Constructs the adapter with event data and their corresponding Firestore document IDs.
AdminEventDetails - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment that displays detailed information about a specific event for admin users.
AdminEventDetails() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminEventDetails
Default constructor required for fragment instantiation.
AdminFragment - com.example.syntaxappproject.ui中的类
Fragment that displays the admin dashboard.
AdminFragment() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ui.AdminFragment
Required empty public constructor for this fragment.
AdminImageDetails - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment that displays detailed information about an event poster image for admin users.
AdminImageDetails() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminImageDetails
 
AdminProfileDetails - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Fragment that displays detailed user profile information for admin users.
AdminProfileDetails() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AdminProfileDetails
Default constructor required for fragment instantiation.
AuthenticationService - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Service class responsible for managing Firebase anonymous authentication in the SyntaxEvents application.
AuthenticationService() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.AuthenticationService
Constructs an AuthenticationService and initializes the FirebaseAuth instance.
AuthenticationService.AuthCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for receiving the result of an authentication operation.
